creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text: As the PORTREVISION of llvm15 have not changed since the breakage (and fix), to fix the issue on the poudriere environment which caused this error, you need to remove broken llvm15-15.0.7_8 package from the poudriere environment as well as updating the ports tree, or waiting for llvm15's PORTSVERSION or PORTSREVISON to be updated.
